name: dogfu
description: Sales toolkit on the dogfu CLI: lead-research (Discover → Qualify → Enrich → CRM), lead-touch (cold outreach cadence in Close), lead-engage (work live deals — opportunities — from first engagement to close), lead-worklist (read-only cross-phase worklist — the prioritized leads to work now, across all stages, with context), crm-cleanup (read-only CRM health audit), first-audit (publish a first-touch SEO/AEO prospect audit and record it on the lead), and narrative-audit (a standalone brand category & narrative-coherence check on a domain), plus berlin-theme — Berlin's brand style guide for on-brand sales collateral.

interface.shortDescription: Research leads and manage outreach in Close
interface.longDescription: Research and qualify sales prospects against an ICP, enrich decision-makers, write results to Close CRM, manage cold follow-up outreach, work live deals (opportunities) from first engagement to close, pull the read-only cross-phase worklist of leads to work now (across all stages, with the context to act), run a first-touch outside-in SEO/AEO audit of a prospect domain and publish it as a single-page report, check whether a brand's category story is told consistently across its site, third-party sources, and live AI answers, and audit the CRM for leads that fell out of the flow — all with the dogfu CLI. Includes berlin-theme — Berlin's brand style guide so any sales collateral you design (pages, one-pagers, posters, emails) comes out on-brand. (first-audit also needs the Bluesnake MCP for the site crawl.)
defaultPrompt: Research and qualify a prospect against our ICP
Who should I work on today across all stages?
Show me which leads need a follow-up today
Which live deals need action today?
A lead replied and we had an intro call — open the deal
Run a first-touch SEO/AEO audit on a prospect domain and publish it
